{{Quote|We are exiles... returning home! Returning from years in an alien environment... working toward this moment! Returning to right the great wrong done when we were driven away!|Klysk|<ref name="marvel50" />}}
'''Klysk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] spokesman who served a group of [[Red Nebula exiles|exiles]] from the [[Red Nebula/Legends|Red Nebula]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Klysk plotted to steal and destroy a pair of [[Great Life Jewels|crimson jewels]] held in a [[Red Nebula temple|temple]] in the Red Nebula. While the [[Priests of the Red Nebula|priests]] of the temple believed that the jewels protected their [[Planet of the Red Nebula|planet]] from destruction and thus held them in high regard, the exiles thought the jewels were abominations that prevented [[Cosmic Destiny]] from proceeding naturally and should be destroyed.<ref name="marvel50" />

The exiles captured a number of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], including [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], on the planet [[Terminus/Legends|Terminus]] and forced them into service to [[Attack on the Red Nebula temple|steal]] the two crimson jewels from the temple in the Red Nebula. When the group arrived aboard the ''[[Nova Prince]]'' on the planet home to the temple, Solo and Chewbacca stole the jewels from the temple and brought them back to Klysk. Solo attempted to bargain with Klysk, but the exile had anticipated this and had persuaded the other [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] to turn on Solo, allowing Klysk to take the jewels and depart the planet, leaving Solo and his co-pilot seemingly stranded. However Solo had switched the jewels before he gave them to Klysk, keeping the genuine gems for himself. Thinking he had the originals, Klysk piloted the ''Nova Prince'' into the planet's [[Sun of the Planet of the Red Nebula|sun]], destroying all aboard.<ref name="marvel50" />

==Behind the scenes==
Klysk appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1981]].<ref name="marvel50" />
